caption: Vesper commands the frozen skyline tonight, her cyber-leather silhouette glowing against the icy blue mist of the digital rain plaza. She navigates the snow-dusted skyscrapers with a magnetic allure, leaving a trail of neon reflections that shimmer across the wet pavement like liquid gold. ⚡💜 #cyberpunk #neonwinter #futuristicfashion #digitalaesthetic
